title: Mobile Banking App Redesign
description: A complete redesign of a mobile banking application focused on simplifying complex financial tasks for everyday users. The project involved extensive user research with 40+ participants, competitive analysis of 12 banking apps, and iterative prototyping over 8 weeks. Key improvements included a streamlined onboarding flow that reduced drop-off by 35%, a redesigned transaction history with smart categorization, and an accessible bill payment flow that tested at 95% task completion rate. The design system was built with accessibility as a core principle, achieving WCAG 2.1 AA compliance across all screens.
shortDescription: Simplifying complex financial tasks for everyday mobile banking users
